article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.8. CA - CM and Construction - Outdoor Pool Tank Rehabilitation Program 2026.01.27_.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $2.625M contract for Burnaby outdoor pool rehabilitation
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on awarding a $2,625,000 contract to ETRO Construction Limited to repair and restore aging outdoor pool tanks, starting with Central Park Outdoor Pool in 2026–2027.
briefs.action_required: If you work in construction or supply trades, watch for future phases — three more pools are planned after Central Park.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council meeting — outdoor pool contract award vote
